§6Oil Refinery§f

§aSeparate hot crude oil into its core fractions — the heart of any petrochemical operation!§f

The Oil Refinery is an industrial machine that refines hot crude oil, hot cracked oil, or hot desulfurized oil into valuable byproducts including §bHeavy Oil§f, §bNaphtha§f, §bLight Oil§f, §bPetroleum Gas§f, and §bSulfur§f.

§6Crafting§f:
Crafted in the §bAssembly Machine§f using §e3× Welded Steel Plate§f, §e16× Copper Plate§f, §e4× Steel Shell§f, §e12× Steel Pipe§f, §e8× Insulator§f, and §e3× Analog Circuit Board§f.

§6Operation§f:
Supply the refinery with §bHot Crude Oil§f (must be pre-heated in a §bBoiler§f) and §bpower§f. It will process §e1,000mB§f at a time and output multiple fractions simultaneously.

§6Recipes§f:
§b• Hot Crude Oil§f (§e1,000mB§f):
  §e500mB§f Heavy Oil, §e250mB§f Naphtha, §e150mB§f Light Oil, §e100mB§f Petroleum Gas, §eSulfur§f byproduct.
§b• Hot Cracked Oil§f (§e1,000mB§f):
  §e400mB§f Cracked Naphtha, §e300mB§f Cracked Light Oil, §e150mB§f Aromatic Hydrocarbons, §e150mB§f Unsaturated Hydrocarbons, §eCrack Oil Tar§f byproduct.
§b• Desulfurized Oils§f: Produce §bParaffin Wax§f instead of sulfur.

Sulfur accumulates as a solid item in the center block on the bottom of the refinery. Extract it via the GUI or automate with item ducts.

§cNote§f: Explosions can §cdamage§f the refinery. If damaged, repair it with a §bBlowtorch§f and §bSteel Plates§f.

§eTip§f: The four output fractions must be further processed in a §bFractioning Tower§f to break them down into even more useful products like §bDiesel§f, §bKerosene§f, and §bHeating Oil§f.
